description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows CI that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs, msvc-qmake-build and msvc-cmake-build, both running on windows-2022. Each job uses a matrix strategy to test with Qt 6.9.1 and Visual Studio 2022. The jobs install Qt, build a project using qmake or cmake, and upload the resulting package as an artifact.
